response.justification: While this candidate is a highly capable senior software engineer with strong craftsmanship practices, they fail multiple critical required qualifications: native-level Japanese proficiency (explicitly required), Linux kernel source-code investigation and modification experience, and any networking or security domain expertise. Their 10+ year career trajectory is entirely web/SaaS backend development (Node.js, TypeScript, React, MongoDB), with only one brief embedded systems role (National Instruments, 2014-2015) over a decade ago that was unrelated to networking or firmware. The role demands embedded networking security expertise that is entirely absent from this profile.
strengths: 10+ years of senior/staff-level software development with proven ability to deliver at major companies (Stripe, Shopify)
Strong software craftsmanship practices including TDD, CI/CD, testing frameworks, and code quality focus
Fluent English with demonstrated technical communication and knowledge-sharing ability
concerns: No native Japanese language proficiency (critical blocker—explicitly required qualification)
No Linux kernel investigation or source-code modification experience (required qualification)
Career entirely in web/SaaS platforms with no networking, embedded firmware, security, or hardware-adjacent software background

key_factors.factor: No embedded networking or security domain expertise
No Linux kernel or embedded systems experience
